assertionResults.title: does not persist guest work across repository instances

assertionResults.title: does not call browser Storage APIs

assertionResults.title: recovers safely from in-memory corruption and reports both corruption paths

assertionResults.title: reports a generic error when corruption is not an Error instance and no backup exists

assertionResults.title: reports Error.message when corruption has no backup

assertionResults.title: reports when both primary and backup payloads are invalid

assertionResults.title: recovers from backup when primary corruption is not an Error instance
